title: Compromise
description: Allows players to choose their alternative language(s).
body:
# Introduction

Compromise allows players to choose their alternative languages. When the game tries to translate localization keys that are not covered by the preferred language, it looks for translations from the alternative languages in the order specified by the player, rather than translating them directly into English.

# Configurations

- Forge 1.12.2: .minecraft\config\compromise.cfg;

- Forge 1.16.5+: .minecraft\config\compromise-client.toml;

- Fabric: .minecraft\config\compromise.toml;

# LICENSE & Extra Notes

- Compromise is under [GNU-AGPL-3.0-only](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/agpl-3.0.html).

- We don't want the mod to be "merged into" | "replaced by" | "Any foo of the same meaning" any modpack-behavior mod (like Un\*\*\*\*\*al Tw\*\*ks or Deb\*\*\*\*y). See [this](https://gist.github.com/fxmorin/9770473614e3e5e0703e44273dab33f7).

- We don't want any modpack using our mod to **charge players in any way**.

# ATTENTION

You **DEFINITELY CAN** add the mod to your modpack.
